name: remote-fit
description: Codex-driven remote job search workflow for Chinese-speaking candidates

scripts.check: node --check scripts/evaluate-remote.mjs && node --check scripts/evaluate-url.mjs && node --check scripts/liveness.mjs && node --check scripts/ats-api.mjs && node --check scripts/browser-extract.mjs && node --check scripts/score-interview.mjs && node --check scripts/estimate-interview-outcome.mjs && node --check scripts/send-application-email.mjs && node --check site.js && node --test
